title: cestrum honduronicaraguense
intro: Cestrum honduronicaraguense, also known as the Honduran Night-Blooming Jasmine or the Night-Blooming Cestrum, is a flowering plant native to Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cestrum honduronicaraguense include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
